title: Minext
description: Lightweight vanilla plus modpack with expanded compatibility for controller play and mobile devices.
body:
# Welcome to MINEXT!

With this modpack, I aimed to expand upon vanilla revamping its original structures, improving its mechanics and adding more decorations, building and culinary options, so it's more of an exploration, farming and cooking-focused pack - at least for the time being. It's intended to provide better controller play and touchscreen compatibility and is very lightweight, to enable players running Minecraft Java Edition on their Android phones with apps like PoJav Launcher to play it.

## Features

- Support for **controllers** with Bedrock Edition-like bridging and aim assist in the optionals
- Fully optimized out of the box
- Revamped combat mechanics inspired on the Mojang combat test
- Fluid **third-person gameplay** with *Shoulder Surfing Reloaded*
- Select between ***Essential Mod*** and ***e4mc*** in the optionals so you can play with friends easily anytime
- Neater look without losing the vanilla feel with ***[Stay True](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/stay-true)*** resource pack
- Revamped structures everywhere you go
- Improved sniffers and archeology
- ***BetterEnd*** and ***BetterNether*** bringing a vastly improved experience to their respective dimensions
- ***Farmer's Delight*** with many add-ons, including integrations with the revamped approach of the End and the Nether
- Build your dreams with many **added furtniture items and decorative blocks and diagonal fences and walls** without going too far beyond the vanilla look and feel
- **Copper hoppers** for simpler item separators
- **Mobs and creatures** that lost the mob votes from ***Friends&Foes*** and realistic bees - and of course, all well-integrated with the other mods
- **Improved overworld generation** with ***Geophilic***
- The ***Afterdark***: a new dimension beyond the Ancient City that has high risks and rewards - but beware: once you enter, the only way to leave is to find an exit portal! Friendly tip: make sure you have two Teleport Catalysts before going
- See further away than ever before enabling optionals ***Distant Horizons***, and enjoy a better look without breaking the bank with ***MakeUp Ultra Fast*** shaders enabling ***Iris***
- **MANY quality of life improvements**: sleeping bags, backpacks, dynamic lights, improved enchantment and anvil mechanics, ***EMI*** to keep track of the new recipes added, Elytra equipping on cape slot allowing you to use chest armor, ***Inventory Totems*** and much, MUCH more

All while only requiring 4GB of RAM allocation with shaders and distant horizons, or 2.5GB without.

A massive thanks to all the Minecraft modding community and all the developers that made all the mods used in this modpack possible.

<details>
<summary>What's under the hood</summary>
